G0.label:
case cons
α : Type u_1
x y head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝ : x ∈ tail✝.getLast? → x ∈ (y :: tail✝).getLast?
⊢ x ∈ (head✝ :: tail✝).getLast? → x ∈ (y :: head✝ :: tail✝).getLast?

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
x y head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : x ∈ tail.getLast? → x ∈ (y :: tail).getLast?
⊢ x ∈ (head :: tail).getLast? → x ∈ (y :: head :: tail).getLast?
